critical_issues.title: PR initially had no committed code changes
critical_issues.action: Implemented function_app.py and tests, then committed and pushed via report_progress.

suggestions.title: Add explicit test coverage for all five required structured log events
suggestions.action: Expanded happy-path test to assert the full required event set: function_started, trapi_request_sent, trapi_response_received, blob_write_succeeded, function_completed.

suggestions.title: Add a test for the direct validation-failure branch in function_app
suggestions.action: Added test_get_and_store_yankees_roster_direct_validation_failure_path to cover fetch returns invalid payload branch.

suggestions.title: Strengthen trigger configuration test robustness
suggestions.action: Replaced source-text matching with FunctionApp metadata inspection by function name and timer binding type.

suggestions.title: Clarify timeout-budget test intent
suggestions.action: Updated test to verify single-fetch normal-path behavior and renamed the test to match what is asserted.

suggestions.title: Improve completion telemetry for idempotent blob conflicts
suggestions.action: Added write_conflict boolean field to function_completed structured log when blob_uri is None.
